Container.Name: shelfarr-bookbridge
Container.Overview: Syncs your Goodreads shelves to Shelfarr as ebook requests. RECOMMENDED: just set the port + config path, start the container, then open the WebUI (port 7373) and configure your Shelfarr URL/token and Goodreads user id/cookie in Settings. Doing it in the GUI is best because the Goodreads cookie and tokens expire — you update them in the GUI without editing/restarting the container. Every variable below is an OPTIONAL bootstrap shortcut; the GUI (saved in /config) is the source of truth and overrides them.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent state (SQLite) + your settings/secrets. Keep this.

Config.Name: Auth Required
Config.Description: local = no login from your LAN, login required from outside | enabled = always | none = never

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional. Sets the GUI admin password on first start (only needed if you access the GUI from outside your LAN). Does not expire.

Config.Name: Insecure transport
Config.Description: Set true if your Shelfarr is reached over http on the LAN (not https)

Config.Name: Shelfarr URL (optional, or set in GUI)
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap. e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3000 — or leave blank and set it in the GUI Settings.

Config.Name: Shelfarr Token (optional, or set in GUI)
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap. shf_ token (scopes search:read, requests:write, requests:read). Better set/updated in the GUI Settings.

Config.Name: Goodreads User ID (optional, or set in GUI)
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap. Numeric Goodreads user id — or set it in the GUI Settings.

Config.Name: Goodreads Cookie (better set in GUI — it expires)
Config.Description: Session cookie for private/>100 shelves. EXPIRES — recommended to set/update it in the GUI Settings so you don't edit the container each time.

Config.Name: Goodreads Feed Key (optional, or set in GUI)
Config.Description: Optional. RSS feed key for private <=100 shelves — or set it in the GUI Settings.

Config.Name: Shelves (optional, or set in GUI)
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap. Comma-separated shelf slugs, e.g. to-read — or set it in the GUI Settings.

Config.Name: Schedule
Config.Description: Cron expression for the sync (default hourly)
